text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The first image suggests a setting primed for gathering and exchange—perhaps a talk or a workshop soon to commence. The arrangement of empty chairs under stark lights invites possibilities of shared thought or dialogue. The second image, with its vivid "R+D" wall and multimedia displays, places me in an environment of exploration and innovation. I feel absorbed by the collision of words, screens, and design. The text on the panel speaks directly to a philosophical unease—the comfort found in confusion and uncertainty, where meaning forms only in retrospect. Amidst these spaces, my mind is both unsettled and invigorated, aware of the dance between structure and ambiguity, between expectation and discovery.
